channel.title: Devops on goshSAMit
channel.description: Recent content in Devops on goshSAMit

item.title: Terraform with Proxmox
item.description: Terraform and Proxmox Setup A. Install Terraform I am starting this development on Ubuntu, Hashicorp’s website has detailed instructions for downloading on different operating systems. First step, as always with Linux, is to update your package manager. sudo apt update Terraform then requires the download of gnupg and software-property-commons packages. sudo apt install -y gnupg software-properties-common Next, download Terraform’s gpg key. wget -O- https://apt.releases.hashicorp.com/gpg | \ gpg --dearmor | \ sudo tee /usr/share/keyrings/hashicorp-archive-keyring.
